title: DC-area forecast: Comfortable today and Saturday. Summer oozes back next week.
contentHtml:
Always a human at the helm: Updated around-the-clock by Capital Weather meteorologists.

Happening now: Like yesterday but not quite as sunny. Morning 50s and 60s head to highs near 80 to the mid-80s. Sunshine is filtered by high clouds and a little smoke, but air quality is good.

What's next? Enjoyable weather through tomorrow, and maybe even acceptable for Sunday. Summer heat and humidity try to ease back later in the weekend, but it may not feel fully like July until the workweek.

Today's daily digit — 9/10: Sunshine is filtered at times on an otherwise comfortable, super-pleasant July day. | 🤚 Your call?
The digit is a somewhat subjective rating of the day's weather, on a 0-to-10 scale.

Did you know American patients can get new medicines 3 years faster than people in other high-income countries? Don't take the wind out of the innovation sails.

When America leads in medicine development, America cures.

Forecast in detail

Today (Friday): Skies are fairly bright even as sunshine is occasionally filtered by a bit of high-altitude smoke and upper-level clouds. Enjoy the comfortable, below-average highs near 80 to the mid-80s. Breezes from the east may gust near 15 mph at times. Confidence: Medium-High 😎 Nice Day!

Tonight: A mix of clouds and stars. A small chance for a brief shower or even a thundershower, mainly in the overnight. Lows range across the 60s. Confidence: Medium-High

Hourly Forecast | Pollen, Air & UV

Tomorrow (Saturday): More sun than clouds. Perhaps a touch more humidity with otherwise comfortable highs again near 80 to mid-80s. Only a slight chance for a brief, stray shower. Confidence: Medium

Tomorrow night: Partly cloudy with another small chance for late-night and predawn sprinkles or a few showers. Lows again in the 60s. Confidence: Medium

Sunday: Somewhat muggier. Highs in the mid- and upper 80s are the current target. We do have a slight chance of showers, maybe an afternoon or evening thunderstorm. Details will come into better focus as we get closer. Confidence: Low-Medium

📬 Get our forecast in your inbox

Our morning forecast email is back! It's included with every level of support — from Free to Sustainer — delivered 7 days a week. Sign up at: capitalweather.com/support-us

A look ahead

Sunday night: A slight chance of evening showers and storms. Skies clear a bit overnight with lows in the mid-60s to low 70s. Confidence: Low-Medium

Probably more July-like with heat building Monday and Tuesday. Highs within a few degrees of 90 but less confidence on how humid it might get. Afternoon and evening storm chances both days. Downpours and more numerous storms probably wait for Tuesday. Confidence: Low-Medium

The public preview period for our Weather Now, Forecast Lab, and Climate Room pages will come to an end this weekend, after which much of the content on those pages will be available exclusively to Friends, Founders, and Sustainers. Become a member to support our work and enjoy unlimited access to our premium content.

DC weather history for July 24

A powerful 1788 hurricane battered the region with extreme tides and damage, while more recently intense heat pushed temperatures past 100 degrees during a prolonged hot spell.
